title: ACE — Agentic Context Engineering
summary_zh: 提出 ACE 框架，將上下文視為演化的 playbook，透過 Generator-Reflector-Curator 三角色架構進行結構化增量更新。解決先前方法的簡潔偏差和上下文崩潰問題。在 agent 基準測試上提升 +10.6%、金融任務 +8.6%，同時降低 86.9% 適應延遲。無需標註即可透過執行回饋適應。
summary_en: Proposes the ACE framework that treats contexts as evolving playbooks, using a Generator-Reflector-Curator three-role architecture for structured incremental updates. Solves brevity bias and context collapse in prior approaches. Achieves +10.6% on agent benchmarks, +8.6% on finance tasks, while reducing adaptation latency by 86.9%. Adapts without labeled supervision via natural execution feedback.
